mapper.select: SELECT id , consult_date , userkey , consult_data , concern1 , concern2 , product , significant , etc FROM tb_consult_info where userkey = #{userKey}

SELECT a.name, COALESCE(a.consult_date, b.consult_date) as consult_date, COALESCE(a.concern1, b.concern1) as concern1, COALESCE(a.concern2, b.concern2) as concern2, COALESCE(a.product, b.product) as product, a.manager, a.region, COALESCE(a.consult_type, b.consult_type) as caseType, COALESCE(a.consult_data, b.consult_data) as consultInfo, a.significant FROM y_consult_raw_labtome a LEFT JOIN citylab_member c ON a.name = c.name LEFT JOIN y_consult_raw_iopelab b ON a.name = b.name WHERE a.name = (SELECT name FROM citylab_member WHERE id = #{id});
